vocab.meaning: một sở thích/hoạt động cá nhân (làm một mình)
vocab.example: While many enjoy team sports, I prefer reading, as it is a solitary pursuit that allows for deep reflection.

vocab.meaning: học chơi hoặc làm gì đó một cách không quá chuyên sâu (thử sức)
vocab.example: I like to dabble in various art forms, from watercolor painting to charcoal sketching, just for the fun of it.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thành tựu/mãn nguyện sau khi hoàn thành việc gì
vocab.example: Finishing a challenging marathon gives me a profound sense of accomplishment that boosts my self-confidence.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng khả năng sáng tạo
vocab.example: Cooking exotic dishes is a hobby that truly helps me nurture my creativity in the kitchen.
Engaging in yoga every morning is my go-to method to alleviate stress and maintain mental clarity.

vocab.meaning: một niềm đam mê bền bỉ/lâu dài
vocab.example: Astronomy has been an enduring passion of mine since I received my first telescope as a child.
I spend most of my weekends practicing photography to hone my skills in capturing natural light.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích ít vận động (ngồi nhiều)
vocab.example: Chess is quite a sedentary hobby, so I try to balance it with regular trips to the local swimming pool.
I am drawn to investigative documentaries because they really stimulate the intellect and offer new perspectives.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi sự đơn điệu/nhàm chán của cuộc sống thường nhật
vocab.example: Creative writing provides a perfect way to escape the mundane and immerse myself in fictional worlds.
